control_description: MFA for all database access, CyberArk PAM for privileged accounts
Imperva DAM monitors all DB queries, alerts on anomalous access patterns
Symantec DLP on endpoints and email gateway
Exabeam UBA monitors for anomalous user activity
Multi-AZ deployment, auto-scaling groups, automated failover
Automated DSR portal with 30-day SLA tracking
AWS S3 Object Lock for backup immutability
Snyk SCA integrated in CI/CD pipeline
All dependencies version-pinned in lock files
Kong API gateway with JWT validation and rate limiting
KnowBe4 monthly phishing simulations, annual training
Proofpoint email filtering with advanced threat protection
Standard Contractual Clauses, encryption in transit, data residency controls
Annual vendor assessments, BitSight continuous monitoring, contractual DPAs
Cloudflare WAF with virtual patching for known CVEs
